questionHtml: State what the presence of alternative Lewis structures shows about the nature of the bonding in the molecule.

meta.title: State what the presence of alternative Lewis structures shows about the nature of the bonding in the molecule.
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 2. Models of bonding and structure
Structure 2.2.11—Resonance structures occur when there is more than one possible position for a double bond in a molecule. Deduce resonance structures of molecules and ions.
